headline: Tech Giants Prop Up Nasdaq Composite as Oil Shock Tests Market Resilience

headline: HSBC lowers AMD to Hold ahead of earnings on limited upside potential
summary: Investing.com -- HSBC on Monday downgraded Advanced Micro Devices to Hold from Buy, raising its price target slightly to $340 from $335, as the bank sees little room for the chipmaker to meaningfully beat market expectations despite strong demand for its server processors.

content.title: HSBC lowers AMD to Hold ahead of earnings on limited upside potential
content.summary: Investing.com -- HSBC on Monday downgraded Advanced Micro Devices to Hold from Buy, raising its price target slightly to $340 from $335, as the bank sees little room for the chipmaker to meaningfully beat market expectations despite strong demand for its server processors.

headline: Latest News In AI Chips - Revolutionizing Fleet Charging with Nexus Megawatt System
summary: Tellus Power has unveiled the Nexus Megawatt Charging System (MCS), a central feature of its innovative Nexus platform aimed at enhancing high-power distributed charging for fleet and commercial applications. The modular system delivers power outputs ranging from 600kW to 1.2MW and supports various charging standards to facilitate deployment across diverse site configurations. Designed to improve energy utilization and power management, the Nexus MCS centralizes power distribution to...
